hero.headline: Water Heater Services Across
hero.subheadline: From Hollywood to Pasadena, Beverly Hills to Burbank — we're 30 minutes away from your hot water emergency.

locationsSection.heading: Find Your Neighborhood
locationsSection.paragraph: Click your area to see services, reviews, and local specialists.

additionalAreasSection.heading: We also serve every corner of LA
additionalAreasSection.paragraph: Same 30-minute response, same upfront pricing — across these areas too.

notListedSection.heading: Don't see your neighborhood?
notListedSection.paragraph: We serve all of Los Angeles County. Call us — if you're in LA, we can help.
